title: Hornet Removal in Harrison, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Harrison, Westchester. Safe nest elimination from $350-$550. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC now!
intro: Hornets nesting around your Harrison property can pose serious risks to your family and neighbors. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Harrison and Westchester County, safely eliminating aggressive hornet colonies from residential and commercial properties. Our experienced technicians handle everything from single nests on historic homes near the Metro-North station to multiple colonies at Harrison's corporate campuses.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings specialized expertise to Harrison's unique mix of spacious estates, commuter-friendly neighborhoods, and commercial districts. We understand the specific hornet pressures in Westchester's suburban environment and deliver safe, effective removal with transparent pricing from $350-$550, backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Harrison's tree-lined streets, mature landscaping around Purchase College area, and proximity to Rye Lake create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, particularly in eaves, overhangs, and garden structures. Our team is familiar with Harrison's beautiful older homes along Harrison Avenue and Halstead Avenue, as well as the corporate properties in the Westchester Financial Center area, ensuring careful treatment that protects both people and property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Harrison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Harrison and Westchester County. Given the danger hornets pose, we prioritize emergency calls and can typically reach your Harrison property within hours of your call during business hours.

faqs.question: What determines the cost between $350 and $550 for hornet removal?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height. A small, easily accessible nest may cost $350, while larger nests in difficult locations like high rooflines or inside wall voids may reach $550. We provide upfront quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Harrison?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted professional treatments and follow strict safety protocols to protect your household. We'll advise you on any necessary precautions during treatment, and the area is typically safe for normal activity within a few hours after service.

faqs.question: Do you handle bald-faced hornets common in Harrison's wooded areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in removing all hornet species found in Westchester, including bald-faced hornets that often build large aerial nests in Harrison's many trees and shrubs. Our technicians have the equipment and expertise to safely eliminate these aggressive colonies regardless of location.
